title: gyrostachys minor
intro: Gyrostachys minor, also known as the East Indian mastich tree or Chinese cinnamon tree, is a type of evergreen tree native to tropical Asia. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gyrostachys minor include the relief of fever, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health. Gyrostachys minor can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with the bark and leaves typically dried and then used in various herbal preparations.
